spec.title: Subagent call outcome by type (success/failure)
spec.description: Goal: spot a subagent type whose calls fail disproportionately. status comes from agent_events, joined to agent_invocations the same way as the cost/token panels above.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(e.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,

FROM agent_events e
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = e.agent_invocation_id

  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id

  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR e.session_id IN (

spec.title: Cache creation tokens by TTL (1h vs 5m)
spec.description: Goal: see how much prompt-cache writing goes to the cheaper-but-longer-lived 1h tier vs the 5m tier that expires between widely-spaced requests. A rising 5m share usually means requests are landing far enough apart that the longer cache window isn't being reused.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 1h' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_1h_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))

    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 5m' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_5m_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate over time (overall)

spec.title: /goal invocations over time
spec.description: Count of litellm calls made under the 'goal' slash command, bucketed by the Window variable. One /goal invocation spans many calls (one whole session), so this tracks call volume, not invocation count - see the table below for one row per invocation.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: /goal usage log
spec.description: One row per /goal invocation (= one session, since turn_id is currently always 0): who ran it, which session, how many LLM calls it took, total wall-clock duration, total tokens, total cost, and the goal text (the argument passed to /goal, i.e. the session's first prompt). Click the magnifier on 'goal text' to see the full text.

spec.rawSql:
WITH goal_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    min(timestamp) AS started_at,
    max(timestamp) AS last_call_at,
    count() AS calls,
    any(user_id) AS session_user_id
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = session_id
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  GROUP BY session_id
),
prompts AS (
  SELECT session_id, argMin(prompt_text, timestamp) AS prompt_text
  FROM agent_messages
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  GROUP BY session_id
),
usage AS (
  SELECT session_id, sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS tokens, sum(cost) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage
  GROUP BY session_id
)
SELECT
  gs.started_at AS timestamp,
  gs.session_user_id AS user,
  gs.session_id AS session,
  gs.calls AS "llm calls",
  round(dateDiff('second', gs.started_at, gs.last_call_at) / 60.0, 2) AS "duration (min)",
  coalesce(u.tokens, 0) AS tokens,
  coalesce(u.cost, 0) AS cost,
  p.prompt_text AS "goal text"
FROM goal_sessions gs
LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.session_id = gs.session_id
LEFT JOIN usage u ON u.session_id = gs.session_id
ORDER BY gs.started_at DESC

  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_repo
ORDER BY tokens DESC

spec.title: ExitPlanMode: user prompt -> proposed plan
spec.description: Every ExitPlanMode tool call paired with the user prompt from the same turn (agent_events joined to agent_messages on session_id+timestamp) and the plan text reported separately by hooks/report_plan_proposal.py (a PreToolUse hook - LiteLLM's raw_payload doesn't carry ExitPlanMode's arguments, they come back empty), matched via an ASOF JOIN on session_id + nearest captured_at at or after the triggering event's timestamp. Click the magnifier on prompt_text/plan_text to see full text.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.user_id,
  ev.session_id,
  ev.turn_id,
  ev.agent_name,
  ev.skill_name,
  ev.status,
  m.prompt_text,
  pp.plan_text
FROM agent_events ev
ASOF LEFT JOIN plan_proposals pp
  ON pp.session_id = ev.session_id AND pp.captured_at >= ev.timestamp
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.timestamp = ev.timestamp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE ev.tool_name = 'ExitPlanMode'
  AND $__timeFilter(ev.timestamp)
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR ev.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name))
ORDER BY ev.timestamp DESC

spec.title: Trace: $session_id
spec.description: One call tree per session, monospace. Right after the header comes a session summary block (duration, cost, tokens in/out, models, prompt count, tool-call count, agents/skills used - two values per line). User prompts/comments and model replies are shown in full (no truncation) and wrap across lines in the viewer; only tool-call argument previews stay short and column-aligned with a right-hand stats block, since a reply/prompt of unbounded length can't share that fixed-width column without being cut back down. Everything before the session's first genuine (non-harness) user message is dropped - a silent auto-retry or warm-up call that never showed up in the CLI itself would otherwise appear as a confusing orphan row. Timestamps only on important nodes - user prompts/comments (marked ● when real, ○ when it's harness-injected noise: goal-check judge calls, suggestion-mode prompts, background stop-hook notifications, conversation-title-generation calls - best-effort detection, not exhaustive, since agent_messages.prompt_text captures any 'user'-role turn verbatim, harness boilerplate included - see _last_user_text's docstring in clickhouse_ingest.py), agent spawns, and replies - not every plain tool call. A leading <system-reminder>...</system-reminder> block is stripped before display, and a <command-args> block is shown as '/command <args>' when present. Tool calls prefer showing their file_path argument when one exists. A row whose own LLM call failed (status='failure') shows the error type from raw_payload.error_information (e.g. rate_limit_error) instead of blank - distinct from a row with failed_tool_name/failed_tool_error set, which means THIS call succeeded but is reacting to a tool that failed one step earlier (shown as an indented 🚨 note above the row) - the two are not the same thing, see the failed_tool_* column comments in schema.sql. Latency/tokens/cost are dimmed (opacity) and tokens are abbreviated (12.3k tok); latency shows in seconds once past 100ms. Shows nothing when no session is selected, one tree for a single session, one tree per session when "All" is selected (bounded by the session_id variable's own 200-session cap). Agent-spawn attribution (which agent_invocations row belongs to which Agent tool_use call) is a best-effort ASOF match on nearest spawned_at, not a real parent link. Nesting is a single level - the data model has no parent link for a sub-sub-agent.

spec.rawSql: WITH selected AS ( SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM agent_events WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id)) ), scoped_events AS ( SELECT ev.session_id AS session_id, ev.timestamp AS timestamp, ev.tool_name AS tool_name, ev.agent_invocation_id AS agent_invocation_id, ev.command_name AS command_name, ev.status AS status, ev.latency_ms AS latency_ms, ev.raw_payload AS raw_payload, ev.failed_tool_name AS failed_tool_name, ev.failed_tool_error AS failed_tool_error, m.prompt_text AS prompt_text, m.response_text AS response_text, lagInFrame(m.prompt_text) OVER ( PARTITION BY ev.session_id, ev.agent_invocation_id ORDER BY ev.timestamp ) AS prev_prompt_text FROM agent_events ev INNER JOIN selected s ON s.session_id = ev.session_id LEFT JOIN agent_messages m ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.timestamp = ev.timestamp ), usage_by_call AS ( SELECT u.session_id AS session_id, u.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tok, sum(u.cost) AS cost FROM agent_usage u INNER JOIN selected s ON s.session_id = u.session_id GROUP BY u.session_id, u.timestamp ), spawn_info AS ( SELECT ev.session_id AS session_id, ev.timestamp AS timestamp, ai.subagent_type AS subagent_type FROM agent_events ev INNER JOIN selected s ON s.session_id = ev.session_id ASOF LEFT JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.session_id = ev.session_id AND ai.spawned_at >= ev.timestamp WHERE ev.tool_name = 'Agent' ), -- A background subagent runs concurrently with the orchestrator's own -- continued work, so sorting every row purely by its own real timestamp -- interleaves two unrelated threads of activity (the subagent's steps and -- whatever the orchestrator did *while waiting*) into one jumbled stream. -- child_anchor gives every agent_invocation_id a single "anchor" timestamp -- - spec.title: Tool calls at $trace_ts
spec.description: Detail table for a single moment in the Trace panel above - click a timestamp link there to list every tool call made by that exact agent_events row or, if the clicked row is an Agent spawn (▸ marker), all tool calls from the spawned child agent and one level of its own sub-agents (arbitrary nesting depth support (handles ingestion race where agent_invocation_id is blank on later rows)). Key = tool name, value = full arguments - use the magnifier/inspect icon on Arguments to see it in full. A single model call can invoke more than one tool in parallel, which the Trace tree above only shows the first of - this table shows all of them. Empty until a timestamp has been clicked ($trace_ts starts blank).

spec.rawSql:
WITH clicked_row AS (
  SELECT timestamp, tool_name, agent_invocation_id, session_id, raw_payload, status, failed_tool_name, failed_tool_error
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE '$trace_ts' != ''
    AND toString(timestamp) = '$trace_ts'
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], session_id))
),
agent_spawn_events AS (
  SELECT session_id, timestamp
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE tool_name = 'Agent' AND agent_invocation_id = ''
    AND session_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM clicked_row)
),
clicked_event_info AS (
  SELECT 
    cr.timestamp AS event_ts,
    cr.tool_name,
    cr.agent_invocation_id,
    cr.session_id,
    cr.status,
    cr.failed_tool_name,
    cr.failed_tool_error,
    if(cr.tool_name = 'Agent' AND cr.agent_invocation_id = '', 'spawn', 'non_spawn') AS click_type
  FROM clicked_row cr
),
-- For spawn clicks, find the next spawn's timestamp (if any) to bound the collection window
next_spawn_ts AS (
  SELECT 
    cei.event_ts,
    argMinIf(ase.timestamp, ase.timestamp, ase.timestamp > cei.event_ts) AS next_spawn
  FROM clicked_event_info cei
  CROSS JOIN agent_spawn_events ase
  WHERE cei.click_type = 'spawn'
  GROUP BY cei.event_ts
),
-- Direct tool calls: clicked row's own tool calls (only if non-spawn)
direct_tool_calls AS (
  SELECT JSONExtractString(tc, 'function', 'name') AS Tool,
         JSONExtractString(tc, 'function', 'arguments') AS Arguments,
         ts AS Ts
  FROM (
    SELECT arrayJoin(JSONExtractArrayRaw(cr.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls')) AS tc, cr.timestamp AS ts
    FROM clicked_row cr
    CROSS JOIN clicked_event_info cei
    WHERE cei.click_type = 'non_spawn'
  ) x
),
-- Child and descendant tool calls: all events within spawn's execution window
-- Key fix: use timestamp-based matching instead of strict agent_invocation_id equality
-- This handles ingestion race (blank agent_invocation_id) and arbitrary nesting depth
child_and_descendant_tool_calls AS (
  SELECT JSONExtractString(tc, 'function', 'name') AS Tool,
         JSONExtractString(tc, 'function', 'arguments') AS Arguments,
         ts AS Ts
  FROM (
    SELECT arrayJoin(JSONExtractArrayRaw(ae.raw_payload, 'response', 'choices', 1, 'message', 'tool_calls')) AS tc,
           ae.timestamp AS ts
    FROM clicked_event_info cei
    LEFT JOIN next_spawn_ts nst ON nst.event_ts = cei.event_ts
    INNER JOIN agent_events ae ON ae.session_id = cei.session_id
    WHERE cei.click_type = 'spawn'
      AND ae.timestamp > cei.event_ts  -- After the spawn
      AND ae.timestamp != cei.event_ts  -- Not the spawn row itself
      -- Before next spawn (if exists; default DateTime64 is 1970-01-01)
      AND (nst.next_spawn = '1970-01-01T00:00:00'::DateTime64(6) OR ae.timestamp < nst.next_spawn)
  )
),
-- Error handling: surface failure rows separately
error_rows AS (
  SELECT
    if(cei.failed_tool_name != '', cei.failed_tool_name, 'LLM_Error') AS Tool,
    cei.failed_tool_error AS Arguments,
    cei.event_ts AS Ts
  FROM clicked_event_info cei
  WHERE cei.status = 'failure' OR cei.failed_tool_name != ''
)
SELECT Tool, Arguments, Ts FROM direct_tool_calls
UNION ALL
SELECT Tool, Arguments, Ts FROM child_and_descendant_tool_calls
UNION ALL
SELECT Tool, Arguments, Ts FROM error_rows
ORDER BY Ts

spec.name: window
spec.label: Window
spec.description: Controls how timeseries data is grouped/aggregated over time (e.g. 1m = per minute); does not affect the selected time range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT agent_name AS __value, agent_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE agent_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT skill_name AS __value, skill_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE skill_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT command_name AS __value, command_name AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE command_name != ''
ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT
  tool_name AS __value,
  replaceOne(tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS __text
FROM agent_events
WHERE startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
ORDER BY __value

spec.name: provider
spec.label: Provider
spec.description: Filters the Model list below. Claude = claude-*, OpenAI = gpt-*/o-series/etc., Other = everything else.
spec.query: All : all, Claude : claude, OpenAI : openai, Other : other

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT model AS __value, model AS __text
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE model != ''
    AND (
      '$provider' = 'all'
      OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-'))
      OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)'))
      OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)'))
    )
)
SELECT __value, __text FROM (
  SELECT __value, __text FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '__none__' AS __value, '(no models for this provider yet)' AS __text WHERE (SELECT count() FROM filtered) = 0
) ORDER BY __value

SELECT DISTINCT user_id AS __value, user_id AS __text FROM agent_events WHERE user_id NOT IN ('', 'unknown-user')
ORDER BY __value

spec.name: session_id
spec.label: Session

spec.rawSql:
SELECT __value, __text FROM (
  SELECT
    session_id AS __value,
    concat(any(user_id), ' - ', session_id) AS __text,
    max(timestamp) AS __ts
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  GROUP BY session_id
  ORDER BY __ts DESC
  LIMIT 200
)
